statements.impact_statement: API Gateway service uses UriComponentsBuilder for webhook URL validation. SSRF to internal AWS services (IMDS, RDS) is possible if user-supplied URLs are not validated.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade spring-boot-starter-web to 3.2.5+ which includes spring-web 6.1.6 with the fix. Add URL allowlist validation for webhook endpoints.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2024-22243
vulnerability.description: Spring Framework open redirect via URL parsing

statements.impact_statement: Redirect functionality in auth flow uses UriComponentsBuilder. Open redirect could be used in phishing attacks targeting customer login.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade to spring-web 6.1.4+ and implement redirect URL allowlist. Only allow redirects to same-origin or configured domains.

statements.impact_statement: jackson-databind 2.16.1 includes the fix for CVE-2022-42003 (fixed in 2.14.0). The SBOM version is ABOVE the fix version. No action required.
statements.action_statement: No action needed. Current version 2.16.1 is patched.

statements.impact_statement: ECS Fargate manages the container runtime. AWS has patched Fargate platform version 1.4.0+ to address this. Verify Fargate platform version in task definitions.
statements.action_statement: Verify all ECS tasks use Fargate platform version 1.4.0 or later. AWS responsibility under shared responsibility model.

statements.impact_statement: AWS CloudFront and ALB have been patched against HTTP/2 Rapid Reset. AWS Shield Standard provides base-level protection. Shield Advanced recommended for production.
statements.action_statement: No application-level action needed. Consider AWS Shield Advanced for enhanced DDoS protection.

vulnerability.name: CVE-2024-22262
vulnerability.description: Spring Framework SSRF via UriComponentsBuilder (additional bypass)

statements.impact_statement: This is an additional bypass for CVE-2024-22259. Even with the 6.1.5 fix, certain URL patterns can still trigger SSRF. Requires spring-web 6.1.6+.
statements.action_statement: Upgrade to spring-boot 3.2.5+ (spring-web 6.1.6+). Implement network-level egress filtering for ECS tasks.
